word.definition: The verb yaw when used for the action of a ship, aircraft, spacecraft, or projectile means "to move to the left or right especially in an uncontrolled manner." More broadly, yaw is used as a synonym of alternate to mean "to change from one to another repeatedly."

sports_fact.text: Tiger Woods held all four major titles at once in 2000-01 — the 'Tiger Slam.' No golfer had done it since the modern Grand Slam existed.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Goldman Sachs Posts Record Quarter as Bank Earnings Kick Off
market.summary: Results due from Citigroup shortly; oil extends climb

quote.text: If I've made a film that turns out to be good, that's a good result. If I've made a film that's good and made a couple of friends, that's a great result. If I've made a film that's no good, but I made a friend, that's still another great result. It’s at a time like now that the importance of other people is thrown into even sharper relief. You realise who your friends are. You know where the love is.
quote.author: Sam Neill

history.text: Opening of the first major US world's fair, the Exhibition of the Industry of All Nations in New York City.
